prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-7I1SWMWLFCM Product Type: OUTDOOR_RECREATION_PRODUCT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Survival Multi Tool Whistle Compass LED Flashlight 7 in 1 Compact Gadget Description: This is a simple to use 7 in 1 waterproof survival multi-purpose whistle.

With camping season just around the corner, it's a great time to teach your children the basic camping and survival skills that have been handed down to you by your parents, their parents, and of course the Boy Scouts.

This multi-use whistle is the start to good preparation and essential outdoor safety. Search Terms: kids camping wilderness hiking gear backpacking accessories camping supplies emergency survival kit Features: - Thermometer (Fahrenheit & Celsius) - 5x Magnifier - Signal Mirror - LED Flashlight - Whistle === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7 in 1 Survival Multi Tool Whistle Compass

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Survival Multi Tool Whistle

anthropic.title_differentiation: Waterproof, LED Flashlight, Thermometer, Magnifier, Signal Mirror, Emergency Whistle, Compact Camping Gear

openai.title_differentiation: Thermometer, 5X Magnifier, Signal Mirror, LED Flashlight, Whistle, Waterproof, Compact Survival Gear
